tasks.title: Domain: deleteLink(db, code) — hard delete, boolean outcome
tasks.dod: deleteLink(db, code) issues one DELETE FROM links WHERE code = ? and returns true when the driver reports changes === 1, false when 0; no preceding SELECT, no deleted_at column, no migration, and no filter added to resolveLink / listLinks / getStats; pure domain, no Express import

tasks.title: Domain: createLinksBulk(db, urls) — per-item validation, dedup, order
tasks.dod: createLinksBulk(db, urls) throws BulkError with reason 'no urls' when urls is absent, not an array or empty, and 'too many urls' above 100 — both checks before the first insert; then calls createLink once per url in input order, catching only ValidationError into { url, error: reason }; returns exactly one entry per input entry; the loop is not wrapped in a transaction and no unexpected error is swallowed

tasks.title: App: routes — 204/404 delete, 200/400 bulk, and the DELETE order rule
tasks.dod: DELETE /api/:code replaces its own 501 stub and answers 204 with no body or 404 { error: 'not found' }; POST /api/shorten/bulk answers 200 with the result array or 400 { error }; DELETE /api/:code is declared below every literal DELETE /api/... route and carries the comment that says why; GET /:code stays last; res.status(204).json is never used; existing tests stay green

tasks.title: Frontend: delete button per row + bulk paste field
tasks.dod: each row carries a delete button guarded by confirm() whose handler never calls res.json() on the 204; a textarea submits one url per line as { urls } and renders a per-line outcome (created / duplicate / error); no batch or url rule is duplicated in the browser; the links table is not grown as an innerHTML template; proven by tests/e2e/bulk-and-delete.spec.js

tasks.title: Tests: unit + integration for AC-01..08
tasks.dod: npm run test:fast green; AC-04 asserts zero rows and uses short urls so the body stays under 100 kB, AC-07 asserts a single row for a duplicate inside one batch, AC-08 asserts the freed code is insertable again, a non-ValidationError throw is proven to propagate out of createLinksBulk, and DELETE /api/links is pinned at 404 to document the swallow
